milestones.title: Money utilities
milestones.spec: src/money.js exports toCents(dollars) -> integer cents, formatCents(cents) -> string like "$12.34", and addCents(...amounts) -> integer sum. All functions reject non-numbers and non-integer cents by throwing. Pure logic, Node ESM.

milestones.title: Account ledger
milestones.spec: src/ledger.js exports createLedger() returning { post(entry), balanceOf(account) }. entry is { account, amount } with amount an integer in cents (may be negative). balanceOf(account) returns the sum of posted amounts for that account, or 0 if none. post throws on a missing account or non-integer amount. Pure logic, Node ESM.

milestones.title: Category report
milestones.spec: src/report.js exports totalsByCategory(entries) where each entry is { category, amount } in integer cents. Returns an object mapping category -> summed cents. Throws if any entry has an empty or missing category. Pure logic, Node ESM.
